title: Regarding publication of Gradation List of Group A and B officers of Haryana Civil Secretariat as it stood on 01/01/2026.

Recruitment to the post of Director General and Chief Executive Officer, Central Medical Services Society, Department of Health and Family Welfare in Level 14 (Pay Band-4; Rs. 37400-67000 plus Grade Pay Rs. 10000 in 6th CPC) on deputation basis-re.
